title: Wire ContourCuttingView to the real profiling intent-gcode endpoint
intent: Replace the setTimeout fake in ContourCuttingView with a real call to POST /api/cam/profiling/intent-gcode. Add src/api/profiling.ts typed client matching drilling/pocketing pattern. Honestly gate unsupported features (DXF import, On-Line cut, Tangent lead-in, spindle) rather than faking them.

diff_articulation.what_changed: New profiling.ts typed API client (CamIntentV1 envelope, error handling). ContourCuttingView.vue wired to real endpoint with explicit contour entry, honest gates for DXF/On-Line/Tangent/spindle, feasibility block UI, G-code download.
diff_articulation.why_not_redundant: Completes the CAM intent frontend bridge (8H profiling lane) alongside 8I drilling and 8J pocketing. ContourCuttingView was a setTimeout fake; now wired to the real backend.

files.intent: New typed API client for POST /api/cam/profiling/intent-gcode. Mirrors drilling.ts/pocketing.ts: typed request/response, raw fetch to preserve structured FastAPI detail on 409.
verification: Review types match ProfileDesignV1/ProfilingContext backend schemas

files.intent: Wire to real profiling endpoint. Replace setTimeout fake with generateProfilingGcode(). Add explicit contour entry, honest gates for unsupported features, feasibility block UI, G-code download.
files.behavior_change: frontend - view now calls real backend instead of faking response
verification: Live test: generate toolpath, verify 200/409 handling, download G-code
